# `!set`

**Category:** control

Set one or more host variables. Top-level string values are template-expanded; non-string values are copied verbatim.

## Parameters

| Name | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `vars` | map | no | Mapping of variable name to value. |

## Examples

```yaml
- !set
  vars:
    service_port: 8080
    config_path: /etc/{{ service_name }}/app.conf
```
